inputs.label: Current Weight
inputs.businessContext: Your current body weight in kilograms.

inputs.label: Target Weight
inputs.businessContext: Your desired target weight in kilograms.

inputs.label: Daily Maintenance Calories
inputs.businessContext: Average number of calories required to maintain current weight on a non-fasting day.

inputs.label: Fasting Days per Week
inputs.businessContext: Number of days per week you plan to fast (typically 1 or 2).

inputs.label: Fasting Duration
inputs.businessContext: Length of each fasting period in hours (standard is 24).

inputs.label: Caloric Deficit per kg Weight Loss
inputs.businessContext: Approximate calorie deficit needed to lose 1 kg of body weight (commonly 7700 kcal).
